name: io.github.yolfinance/yolfi-agent
title: Yolfi Payments MCP
description: Let AI agents add Yolfi crypto checkout, paylinks, webhooks, and status checks.

environmentVariables.name: YOLFI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Yolfi organization API key. Required for API tools that read or mutate organization, webhook, settlement, paylink, or transaction data.

environmentVariables.name: YOLFI_API_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Optional Yolfi API base URL. Defaults to https://app.yolfi.com/api.

environmentVariables.name: YOLFI_PAY_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Optional hosted checkout base URL. Defaults to https://pay.yolfi.com.
